title: Sales Manager Vacancy at DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Sales Manager to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd:
DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd!
